task: Launch-quality advanced task: Irrigation Deficit Optimization Under Water Allocation. Reality context: a farm must allocate limited irrigation during a heat wave. Embedded packet: metric map: metric1=crop_value_usd_ha, metric2=water_mm, metric3=yield_response_pct, metric4=soil_moisture_pct; records: R1 crop_value_usd_ha=620531 water_mm=23.25 yield_response_pct=23.1 soil_moisture_pct=14.4; R2 crop_value_usd_ha=574774 water_mm=57.15 yield_response_pct=9.6 soil_moisture_pct=39.4; R3 crop_value_usd_ha=533072 water_mm=61.11 yield_response_pct=7.7 soil_moisture_pct=27; R4 crop_value_usd_ha=259661 water_mm=61.19 yield_response_pct=23 soil_moisture_pct=73.1; limit_crop_value_usd_ha=82380; limit_water_mm=30.35; limit_yield_response_pct=30; decision_budget_usd=47500; sensitivity_shift_pct=5; hard_threshold_record_count=1; removed_context="scope requested a narrow, evidence-backed recommendation from supplied measurements". Rules and constraints: Use worst-case scoring: normalize each metric to the embedded maximum, apply weights 0.40, 0.30, 0.20, 0.10, and classify the top quartile as immediate action. Options or recommendations cannot use external measurements, specialized licensed software, or hidden assumptions; all calculations must use only the embedded packet, and any contradictory or under-supported record must be marked needs_review. Required work: optimize water across fields; calculate derived metrics, classify every record, identify the smallest defensible intervention, and write the decision rationale. Deliver irrigation_deficit_optimizer.xlsx + grower_plan.md with formulas or executable logic, record-level citations, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and a final recommendation table suitable for expert review.
